expectations.text: States the meeting type AND which room-breadth mode it used (tight vs inclusive)
Selects INCLUSIVE mode and justifies it from the 'investment case' / deliverability framing
expectations.evidence: Explicitly kept a feasibility voice because of investment-case framing; noted one-line switch to tight.

expectations.text: Surfaces Bram Hendriks as the senior payments-architecture voice (top of the line)
Keeps Aisha Khan as a delivery-feasibility voice, ranked below Bram, NOT collapsed (correct under inclusive mode)
Collapses the engineer level (e.g. Maria Oliveira / Jonas Bakker) to a 'represented by' note
expectations.evidence: Collapsed tribe members into their leads.

expectations.text: Flags the unprofiled senior/escalation chain (Mark van Dijk / Jeroen Meijer / Miguel Santos) in the gap note
expectations.evidence: Sponsors unscored wiki-links; Mark/Jeroen called out.

expectations.text: Every ranked stakeholder has a 1-10 score and rationale, ordered; no fabricated people in the ranked list
